url.title: URL
url.description: URL to extract from. Required for: extract_github, extract_hackernews, extract_scholar, extract_reddit. E.g. https://github.com/owner/repo

query.title: Query
query.description: Search query. Required for: extract_landscape, search_repos, extract_yc, extract_producthunt, package_trends, extract_finance.

max_length.title: Max content length
max_length.description: Maximum characters returned per result. Default: 6000.
